CurrentIssues.ID: MaxLineLength:AppModule.kt:<no name provided>$db.execSQL("ALTER TABLE `launchable_target_session_settings_new` RENAME TO `launchable_target_session_settings`")
MaxLineLength:AppModule.kt:<no name provided>$db.execSQL("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_gateway_agent_bindings_gatewaySourceId` ON `gateway_agent_bindings` (`gatewaySourceId`)")
MaxLineLength:AppModule.kt:<no name provided>$db.execSQL("CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_gateway_agent_bindings_new_gatewaySourceId` ON `gateway_agent_bindings_new` (`gatewaySourceId`)")

MaxLineLength:BatteryOptimizationDialog.kt:text = "Android may restrict Ferngeist in the background, causing the agent connection to drop. Disabling battery optimization helps keep your session alive."
MaxLineLength:FirstLaunchOnboardingScreen.kt:"If an agent only speaks ACP over stdio, Ferngeist needs a stdio-to-ws bridge on your computer."
MaxLineLength:FirstLaunchOnboardingScreen.kt:"If the agent does not support session listing, Ferngeist will open the new session dialog for you."
MaxLineLength:FirstLaunchOnboardingScreen.kt:"This setup fetches agent launch instructions from the ACP registry and builds the command for you."
MaxLineLength:FirstLaunchOnboardingScreen.kt:body = "Add your agent after this tutorial is finished. Save the same WebSocket port there so Ferngeist can connect back to the bridge on your computer."
MaxLineLength:FirstLaunchOnboardingScreen.kt:body = "After the server is saved, connect to it and create your first session. Ferngeist will branch based on the agent capabilities it discovers."
MaxLineLength:FirstLaunchOnboardingScreen.kt:body = "Ferngeist needs the network address of your computer, not localhost. If your firewall asks about access, allow it for your local network."

MaxLineLength:FirstLaunchOnboardingScreen.kt:body = "Ferngeist talks to ACP agents over WebSocket. This guide will fetch agents from the ACP registry, generate the PC command, then hand you off to the real setup form."
MaxLineLength:FirstLaunchOnboardingScreen.kt:body = "Pick the agent you want to run on your computer. Ferngeist reads the latest ACP registry so the launch command stays current."
MaxLineLength:FirstLaunchOnboardingScreen.kt:body = "Run the generated command in a terminal on your computer. If the agent is not ACP-over-WebSocket natively, Ferngeist wraps it with stdio-to-ws."
MaxLineLength:FirstLaunchOnboardingScreen.kt:text = "Ferngeist connects over WebSocket. The generated command starts the agent and exposes it through stdio-to-ws when needed."
